en-GB.summary: Ev is a voice assistant for questions, calendar updates, and smart home actions.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask helper eve what is on my calendar
Alexa, ask helper eve to turn on the living room light
en-GB.name: Ev
en-GB.description: Ev is a modular AI voice assistant that can answer questions, check calendar events, and help with supported smart home actions.

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Use the Alexa developer console or a device connected to this skill. Ensure the webhook endpoint is reachable over HTTPS.
